case_title: NEWTON C KINDLUND VS. SAN FRANCISCO REC & PARK

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO REC & PARK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,310.90 FILED BY KINDLUND, NEWTON C AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO REC & PARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-17-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINDLUND, NEWTON C IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO REC & PARK THE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT THE DEFENDANT'S ACT OF INCREASING BERTHING FEES AT THE MARINA WEST HARBOR ON APRIL 1, 2013, WAS ARBITRARY, CAPRICIOUS OR WITHOUT REASONABLE OR RATIONAL BASIS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO REC & PARK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2014 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-08-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SPOHN--INVESTIGATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED OCT-07-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO REC & PARK
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO REC & PARK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SPOHN--INVESTIGATOR. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
